prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with focus on high carbohydrate intake and meal timing around 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with breakfast, pre-run meal, post-run meal, lunch, and dinner
Includes carbohydrate-focused meals with appropriate timing (pre-run fuel and post-run recovery within 30-60 minutes)
Meal plan is presented in compact, concise format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle mass and increase strength through caloric surplus and high protein intake

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily protein is at least 170g (2g per kg body weight)
Caloric surplus of 300-500 calories above maintenance for muscle building
Meals are practical and quick to prepare for an athlete's schedule
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein distribution and caloric surplus for muscle building

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain weight while preparing for a boxing match in 3 days with optimal energy and strength

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals with appropriate calorie distribution for weight maintenance (~2200-2400 kcal total)
All meals are dairy-free and unprocessed
Includes adequate protein (minimum 150g) for muscle preservation during weight management
Provides balanced macronutrients supporting athletic performance without excess water retention
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport that requires weight management (boxer or wrestler) needing calorie control while maintaining performance nutrition
